GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM5+  GM5-  GM1+  GM3+  GM1-  GM3-  GM2+  GM4+  GM2-  GM4-  GM7  GM9  GM6  GM8  M5+  M5-  M1+  M3+  M1-  M3-  M2+  M4+  M2-  M4-  M7  M9  M6  M8  N1  N2  P1  P4  P2  P3  P5  P7  P6  X3+  X4+  X3-  X4-  X1+  X2+  X1-  X2-  X5  X6
